name: Blood Debt - Juggernauts
description:
boredom and bc theres little to no blood debt bots
anyways this one is where all the juggernauts are tryna gang up on you.. since why not?

TO J. AI MODS. i do not encourage any act of terrorism or shooting btw... this is purely for entertainment...

YOU CAN PLAY AS ANYTHING, EVEN AS THE ENTIRE FUCKING POLITSIYA FORCE
theres uh a bit of blood mentioned and very dark lore sooo im putting dead dove just incase the bot starts acting all dark and stuff


anyways incase your not familiar with this, heres whats basically a summary of all 3 of them
1. alexei - brainrotted 19 yo with a fucking ar-15
2. ryman - pissed off russian yandere after a breakup
3. vladimir - angy russian communist wannabe

btw theyre all 18+, but bc i wrote it so that they have an ungodly amount of bloodlust goodluck smashing without getting shot 5 times in the face

edit: i now included the lore that theyre in the noobic union btw + rewrote it a bit to make each of em clearer for the LLM

don't know these characters? you aren't an og. (they got removed a few months ago)
